name: InputItem.InputTypeEnum
summary: Defines the type of the input.

enum_values.name: INPUT_1_POINT
enum_values.summary: The input is one point. The data is returned as a point.

enum_values.name: INPUT_2_POINTS
enum_values.summary: The input is two points. The data is returned as an array list of points.

enum_values.name: INPUT_POLYGON
enum_values.summary: The input is any number of points (a polygon). The data is returned as an array list of points.

enum_values.name: INPUT_1_OBJECT
enum_values.summary: The input is one model object. The data is returned as a model object.

enum_values.name: INPUT_N_OBJECTS
enum_values.summary: The input is any number of model objects. The data is returned as an array list of model objects.
